message:
fix(runtime): Add exception type comparison to assertEqual

Enables assertEqual to compare exception class types with strings by
checking for a .name field on struct types. When comparing something
like assertEqual(ZeroDivisionError, exc_type) where ZeroDivisionError
is an ExceptionClass struct and exc_type is a "ZeroDivisionError" string,
the comparison now works by matching the exception class .name field.

This fixes runtime comparison failures when testing exception types
against stored exception type names in contexts like
catch_unraisable_exception().
